calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-05-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Application In Support Of Entry Of Judgemnt Pursuant To Ccp 585 And 585; And San Francisco Superior Court
Off Calendar Feb-23-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Court Trial/Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Leo LaRocca, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Calender-Robinson Co., Inc.
Request to waive live testimony of witness was granted in open court.
Default entered against Defendant(s): Marc Hendricks.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages/Principal - $20,000.00
Prejudgment Interest - none
Attorney's Fees - $3,480.00
Costs - $712.65 for a total judgment in the amount of $24,192.65

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-06-2012 Continued To Apr-20-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-15-2011 Set For Case Management Conference On Jan-20-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818
Off Calendar Jun-01-2011 Denied

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-10-2011 Set For Trial On Sep-19-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-29-2011 Off Calendar
